title: 英女皇伊利沙伯二世：英軍在二戰參與的香港保衛戰是遠東其中一場著名戰役

replies.msg:
A message from Her Majesty The Queen on the 75th anniversary of VJ (Victory in Japan) Day.

Although the war in Europe ended on 8 May 1945, the war in the Far East continued. Since late 1941 Britain and Commonwealth armed forces had been engaged in the Far East theatre of war, most notably the Burma campaign (the 14th Army), as well as the Battles of Singapore and Hong Kong.

On the 15 August 1945, Japan surrendered and the Second World War came to an end.

儘管歐洲地區戰火於1945年5月8日平息，但遠東地區戰爭仍在繼續。

自1941年底以來，英國和英聯邦武裝力量就參與了遠東地區戰爭，最著名的是緬甸戰役（第14軍），以及新加坡和香港之戰。

1945年8月15日，日本投降，第二次世界大戰結束。

today we mark the 75th anniversary of VJ day. which brought victory for the allies and finally marked the end of the second world war.

Those of us who remember the conclusion of the Far East campaign. whether on active service overseas, or waiting for news at home, will never forget the jubilant scenes and overwhelming sense of relief. Amongst the joy at the end of the conflict. we also remembered. as we do today. the terrible devastation that it brought, and the cost borne by so many.

Prince Philip and I join many around the world in sending our greateful thanks to the men and women from across the Commonwealth, and Allied nations, who fought so valiantly to secure the freedoms we cherish today. May the memory of their sacrifice and bravery remain with us always

Elizebeth R.

今天是 V-J Day 75週年。 它為同盟國帶來了勝利，並最終標誌著第二次世界大戰的結束。

我們當中那些記得遠東戰爭結束的人。 無論是在國外服役還是在家裡等待消息，都永遠不會忘記歡樂的場面和壓倒性的解脫感。 在衝突結束時的喜悅中。 我們還記得。

像今天一樣 它帶來的可怕破壞以及如此之多的代價。

菲臘親王和我與世界各地的許多人一起，對英聯邦各地的同盟國以及為捍衛我們今天所珍視的自由而英勇奮戰的人們，表示由衷的感謝。 願他們犧牲和勇敢的記憶永遠伴隨著我們。

伊利沙伯二世
